name: Zucchini Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the eggs, oil, and sugar until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, cocoa, vanilla, zucchini, and nuts) until smooth.
3. Combine the two mixtures until thoroughly blended.
4. Spread the batter evenly into a greased jelly roll pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
